name: Grant Access To a Client For A Webstore You've Created
body:
When you create a webstore from within the Partner Tools Home page, your clients do not get access to the webstore by default.

During the trial or at the point of transferring ownership, you can add a client to the webstore by adding a staff user with administrator access.

To add a staff user:

  1. Create A Maropost Commerce Store On Behalf Of A Client.
  2. Refer to the instructions for Adding a User account here.
